settings.heading: Review starting prices before requesting a quote.
settings.intro: These examples help you estimate a project quickly. Final pricing is confirmed after order details and artwork are reviewed.

settings.heading: Need help visualizing the order?
settings.intro: Send artwork or describe the project. L F Graphco can review placement, garment options and decoration method before final pricing.

settings.heading: Quote screen printing, embroidery, full-color apparel, banners, signs and promotional products in one place.
settings.intro: Use this form for apparel programs, team stores, company uniforms, church apparel, fundraisers and branded merchandise.
